  \begin{aligned}
    m_0 &\to m_1 \text{ if } \dot{\theta}_t \ge 0.02,\\

    a_{m_2} &= 3.98,\quad m_2 \to m_1 \text{ if } \dot{\theta}_t < -0.49.
